institution.name: Cincinnati State Technical and Community College

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Cincinnati State Technical and Community College fell 50% between 2021 and 2024 (100.0% → 50.0%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Cincinnati State Technical and Community College rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($9.1k → $10.0k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Cincinnati State Technical and Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.3% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Cincinnati State Technical and Community College rose 40% between 2006 and 2009 (11.9% → 16.7%).
